content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: Implemented path_transform (optional, keyword-only-by-convention, added as last param) on BaseLoader-derived FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader; applied before resolution, original name kept for TemplateNotFound errors. Since fallback_searchpath isn't visible in my copy of loaders.py, please add it after my path_transform param (or use keyword args) to avoid positional clashes in FileSystemLoader.__init__/PackageLoader.__init__.
